channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Donnie Wahlberg Reveals the Tough Part of Filming “Boston Blue” in His Hometown
item.description: The real-life Bostonian, who plays a New Yorker on the series, said there's plenty of fanfare when he's on location

item.title: Mike Myers Returns to the Screen After 4 Years with a Surprise Role in Michael Jackson Biopic
item.description: Mike Myers cameos in the new Michael Jackson biopic as Walter Yetnikoff, who was the president and CEO of Jackson's record label CBS Records from 1975...

item.title: Laverne Cox Says “Animal Farm ”Is Prescient ‘Now More Than Ever’ (Exclusive)
item.description: The actress spoke with PEOPLE at the New York City premiere of the animated film based on George Orwell’s 1945 novel

item.title: Anne Hathaway Says She and Andy Sachs Have Both Changed in 1 Major Way 20 Years After “The Devil Wears Prada” (Exclusive)
item.description: Revisiting her ‘Devil Wears Prada’ character, it was easy for Hathaway to relate, she says

item.title: “Storage Wars” Star Darrell Sheets Dies at 67
item.description: Darrell Sheets died by apparent suicide on Wednesday, April 22, police said

item.title: Rep. Troy Downing Asks If Grindr's D.C. Event Is Sausage-Based Party
item.description: Rep. Troy Downing's trying to figure out if Grindr's inaugural event before the White House Correspondents' Dinner is all about meaty sausages. Yes, w...

item.title: Madonna's Full List of Missing Coachella Clothes Revealed
item.description: Madonna’s been sounding the alarm over her missing wardrobe -- and TMZ’s now got the full list of what went missing ... including a lavender corset wo...

item.title: Jerry Jones Nearly Wipes Out In Front Of Bill Clinton
item.description: Jerry Jones was holding court at a pre-draft press conference on Wednesday when things took a wobbly turn ... the president almost fell in front of th...

item.title: Bill Cosby Accuser Says His New Trial Bid Should Be Tossed, Filed Too Late
item.description: Bill Cosby isn't backing down from his bid to erase his massive civil court loss ... but accuser Donna Motsinger's legal team says his latest Hail Mar...

item.title: 'Storage Wars' Star Darrell Sheets Dead at 67
item.description: "Storage Wars" star Darrell Sheets is dead, TMZ has confirmed. Lake Havasu Police in Arizona tell TMZ Sheets apparently died from a self-inflicted gun...
